name: Impossible Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat to 350°F.
2. Grease pie plate, 9" x 1-1/4".
3. Beat milk, butter, vanilla, eggs, granulated sugar, and Bisquick until smooth in a blender for 30 seconds on High or beat with a hand beater for 1 minute.
4. Pour batter into the prepared plate.
5. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, about 30 minutes.
6. Cool completely.
7. Arrange banana slices over the pie.
8. Beat whipping cream and powdered sugar in a chilled bowl until stiff; spread over top.
